creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

commit 3c3e93643347fcfad33eb9ed763ef4d6df84f56c
Author:     Henry <PopularMoment@protonmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2024-09-20 12:01:08 +0000
Commit:     Yasuhiro Kimura <yasu@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-09-21 20:21:34 +0000

    databases/valkey: Ensure valkeysentinal only starts if explicitly enabled

    Incorrect variable in the valkeysentinal rc script can cause
    valkeysentinal to be started even if not explicitly enabled.

    PR:             281605

 databases/valkey/Makefile                | 1 +
 databases/valkey/files/valkeysentinel.in | 2 +-
 2 files changed, 2 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)
